cause: Three heirs were crowned in rival road capitals.
Mage registry revolt after royal families attempted hereditary mage confiscation.
Road plague spread faster because logistics moved infected armies and grain clerks.
Maren leagues refused to finance another eastern campaign.
Kavari compacts sealed key passes and cut imperial access to iron.
Gharu service colonies rebelled against hereditary military obligations.
Nalari charter houses withdrew recognition from imperial succession records.
Taluun Horse Rings broke eastern forts and made the border impossible to tax.
